programme.title: Next Friday
programme.desc: Craig bails his friend out of trouble, survives a climactic confrontation with Debo, the neighborhood bully, and ends up with the girl. In Next Friday the bully is back as Debo, who spent two years behind bars, is released from prison. Fearing for his son's safety, Craig's father sends his son to live with Uncle Elroy. However, Craig soon learns that trouble can find you no matter where you live.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friday After Next
programme.desc: Finds Craig (Ice Cube) and Day-Day (Mike Epps) back in the old neighborhood where it all began. It's Christmastime and a ghetto Santa Claus breaks into their run-down apartment, stealing all their presents, along with anything else he can stuff into his sack, including the rent money hidden in their stereo speakers. Their only hope to not get evicted before Christmas is to take jobs as security guards at a local mall, where they learn some comic lessons about the true meaning of the holidays.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Night School
programme.desc: Teddy Walker is a successful salesman whose life takes an unexpected turn when he accidentally blows up his place of employment. Forced to attend night school to get his GED, Teddy soon finds himself dealing with a group of misfit students, his former high school nemesis and a feisty teacher who doesn't think he's too bright.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Danny and Nia juggle four under four, while Kristen and Luke don't see eye-to-eye as they transition to first-time parenthood; Brittany tries to get her sparkle back in a new relationship, but Zack worries they're moving too fast; when Kristen and Nia cohost a Sip and See event, Michelle becomes anxious when Jesse's girlfriend Lacy surprisingly shows up.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Lala invites most of the group to celebrate her daughter Sosa's first birthday, leaving some feeling excluded; Janet tries to make amends with a few members of the group; Tom and Michelle's bond continues to grow.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Brittany takes the first step toward regaining her self-confidence with a mommy makeover consultation; Jasmine's growing friendship with Lala is tested on a girls' night out, leaving Michelle in the middle.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Danny and Nia continue to struggle with their newborn daughter refusing a bottle; as Kristen grapples with postpartum blues, her relationship with Luke is tested when their first date night out without Kaia turns into a disaster.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Janet's game night olive branch yields mixed results; Jesse gives Lacy a divorce update in hopes of taking things to the next level; Kristen and Luke continue to struggle with their communication.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: After the blow up at Kyle's gay mixer, the women discuss Brandi's influence over Kim; Lisa Vanderpump is nervous when her son receives his genealogy test results; the women attend Eileen's movie premiere at a suburban shopping center.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Eileen organizes a table-read for her husband's latest Hollywood script, and emotions run high; Brandi agrees to a 21-day cleanse but attending Lisa Vanderpump's surprise birthday party causes her to second-guess her decision to stay sober.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: The women are forced to set aside their differences and work together as teams while taking part in Yolanda's scavenger hunt; the women embark on a group trip to Amsterdam; at a charity gala, Kim reproaches Lisa Rinna for talking behind her back.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Kim and Lisa Rinna continue to aggravate each other, culminating in an explosive dinner that causes Kyle to flee the scene; the women enjoy the local space cakes, but the fun sours when Brandi blows up at Kyle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: The women split into two groups to explore Amsterdam; Eileen confronts Lisa Rinna about her lack of support; all of the unresolved issues come to a head while the women are at dinner on a riverboat; Brandi playfully slaps Lisa Vanderpump.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Lisa Vanderpump refuses to accept Brandi's apology; the women return home after a final dinner in Amsterdam; Brandi gets bad news about her father's health; Kyle angrily reveals to Kim what Brandi has been saying behind her back.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: The women attend an over-the-top party thrown by friend Adrienne Maloof; Lisa Vanderpump confronts Brandi about the slap delivered in Amsterdam; Kyle gets angry with Lisa Rinna for not corroborating that Brandi is worried about Kim's sobriety.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: Jo-Ellen and Rosie clash over rumors about Kelsey's unconventional relationship; new to Rhode Island, Ashley learns to fit in with a group of friends whose history runs deep; small town secrets come to the surface at Jo-Ellen's Fourth of July party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: Business pressure and affair rumors send the girls to Newport for a tense wine-fueled face-off.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: Set against the shores of the Ocean State, The Real Housewives franchise expands into the world of a tight-knit circle of Rhode Islanders who have deep community roots and families that go back generations.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: After their explosive fight, Kelsey and Liz are forced to confront issues in their friendship; Alicia's aunts have a few wise words for Rulla regarding her marriage; the ladies go on a railroad excursion that ends with another friendship possibly being derailed.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: Tensions hit open water as truces are tested and polo antics ignite confrontation.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: With her grand opening approaching, Kelli finds herself under fire as accusations surface from multiple directions; Drew makes her return to the silver screen and slips up about what's really been happening.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.sub-title: Where's the Beef ... and the Budget?
programme.desc: With financial rumors slow-cooking in the headlines, Pinky feels the pressure rising; a questionable claim has the ladies on edge as Cynthia lines up a girls' getaway; Porsha attempts to keep her dating life fresh; Dennis stays firmly on her plate.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: Celebrations sour in Dallas when room drama and fresh conflict shake the group.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: Follow a tight-knit circle of Rhode Islanders who have families that go back generations; these decade-long friendships prove that in a state this small, there's no escaping your past, or each other.

programme.desc: As Ben Waddell's new girlfriend arrives to the Summer House, she and Ciara Miller bond over manicures: "This is for every bitch who said I don't make friends easily.".

programme.desc: KJ and Dara make a surprising announcement; Mia is forced to confront some hard truths about her relationship; West apologizes for his actions, which leads to a long overdue conversation.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: You Ripped Up His Birth Certificate?!?; Unlock: My Man Got Me & My Ex-BFF Pregnant
programme.desc: Dayrel says he's being shut out of his son's life, while Shanquelle says she's always been certain Dayrel is the father and that his doubts are the real issue; Lakaylyn was thrilled to be pregnant with her boyfriend Maurice's baby until she learned he got her best friend pregnant at the same time; Maurice says he stepped out because Lakaylyn was talking to another man.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Daisy is overwhelmed with the high-maintenance guests and struggles to ask for help, so a request from Gary sends her over the edge; when a guest injury occurs on the water toys, Capt. Glenn goes into high alert.

programme.desc: In an effort to turn the charter around, Capt. Glenn takes the guests on a sail; chef Ileisha continues to leave the guests waiting too long between courses; Capt. Glenn gives her honest feedback.

programme.desc: Another engine issue emerges, forcing Capt. Glenn to keep the guests entertained; Daisy and Colin make up after their fight as their relationship grows stronger; Daisy confronts Gary about Mads and claims he's playing his usual games.

programme.desc: After Chase confides in Gary about Alex's lackluster work ethic, Chase's trust is broken when Gary tells Alex about their conversation.

programme.desc: Capt. Glenn reprimands the crew as recent slip-ups are directly affecting communication and morale; Daisy breaks down when she's proven wrong about the walkies not working; chef Ileisha is determined to prove she can complete a 10-course dinner.

programme.sub-title: Man Buns It Has Been Fun

programme.sub-title: Head of the Deck; Stew Department
programme.desc: Chef Ben and Jenna try to take their flirtations to the next level, but Eddy's jealousy and Mike's interference get in the way. After Mike crosses a line with Daisy, tensions explode across the boat. Crew gossip sparks a room swap.
